meta.title: 虚拟与真实的边界
meta.description: Native-level discourse on the boundary between virtual and real in Chinese: idioms, simulacrum theory, formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 원어민 수준의 가상·현실 경계 담화: 성어, 시뮬라크르 이론, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「虚拟现实」(xūnǐ xiànshí) means "virtual reality", a simulated, computer-generated environment.
explanation.ko: 「虚拟现实」(xūnǐ xiànshí)는 컴퓨터로 생성된 시뮬레이션 환경, 즉 '가상현실'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「虚拟现实」是什么意思？(What does 虚拟现实 mean?)
choices: 虚拟现实(virtual reality — a simulated, computer-generated environment)

explanation.en: 「拟像」(nǐxiàng, simulacrum) refers to a copy or representation with no original real referent, a concept from Baudrillard.
explanation.ko: 「拟像」(nǐxiàng)는 원본이 없는 복제·표상을 뜻하는 보드리야르의 개념이다.

questions.prompt: 「拟像」是什么意思？(What does 拟像 mean?)
choices: 没有原始对应实体、却被当作真实的复制品或表征(a copy or representation that has no original real referent, yet is treated as real)
完全无意义的空洞符号

explanation.en: 「真假难辨」is an idiom meaning "it's hard to distinguish the real from the fake".
explanation.ko: 「真假难辨」는 '진위를 구별하기 어렵다'는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「真假难辨」是什么意思？(What does 真假难辨 mean?)
choices: 真实与虚假之间的界限变得模糊，难以清楚区分(the boundary between real and fake becomes blurred, difficult to clearly distinguish)

explanation.en: 「沉浸式体验」(chénjìnshì tǐyàn) means "immersive experience", where the user feels fully present within a simulated environment.
explanation.ko: 「沉浸式体验」(chénjìnshì tǐyàn)는 사용자가 가상 환경에 완전히 몰입하는 체험을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「沉浸式体验」是什么意思？(What does 沉浸式体验 mean?)
choices: 与现实完全割裂的抽象概念
仅停留在表面的浅层体验
毫无感官参与的纯理论学习
让用户全身心投入、仿佛置身于虚拟环境之中的体验(an experience that fully immerses the user, as if they were physically present in the virtual environment)

explanation.en: 「数字身份」(shùzì shēnfèn) means "digital identity", the persona and identity markers a person establishes in virtual/online spaces.
explanation.ko: 「数字身份」(shùzì shēnfèn)는 온라인·가상 공간에서 형성하는 인격과 정체성을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「数字身份」是什么意思？(What does 数字身份 mean?)
choices: 数字身份(digital identity — the online persona and identity markers a person establishes in virtual spaces)

explanation.en: 「虚拟现实」means "virtual reality".
explanation.ko: 「虚拟现实」는 '가상현실'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 随着科技的迅猛发展，___技术正在深刻改变人们体验世界的方式。(With the rapid development of technology, virtual reality technology is profoundly changing the way people experience the world.)

explanation.en: 「拟像」describes copies with no original referent.
explanation.ko: 「拟像」는 원본 없는 복제를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 鲍德里亚提出的___理论认为，当代社会中充斥着大量没有真实原型的复制符号。(Baudrillard's theory of the simulacrum holds that contemporary society is filled with a great number of copied signs that have no real original prototype.)
choices: 没有原始对应实体、却被当作真实的复制品或表征
完全无意义的空洞符号

explanation.en: 「真假难辨」describes difficulty distinguishing real from fake.
explanation.ko: 「真假难辨」는 진위 구별의 어려움을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 随着人工智能生成内容技术的进步，网络信息呈现出___的复杂局面，公众辨别难度日益增大。(With the advancement of AI-generated content technology, online information presents a complex situation where it's hard to distinguish real from fake, and the difficulty for the public to discern increases day by day.)

explanation.en: 「沉浸式体验」means "immersive experience".
explanation.ko: 「沉浸式体验」는 '몰입형 체험'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 这款虚拟现实设备为用户提供了极为逼真的___，让人几乎无法分辨虚拟与现实的界限。(This virtual reality device provides users with an extremely realistic immersive experience, making it almost impossible to distinguish the boundary between virtual and real.)
choices: 与现实完全割裂的抽象概念
仅停留在表面的浅层体验
毫无感官参与的纯理论学习

explanation.en: 「数字身份」means "digital identity".
explanation.ko: 「数字身份」는 '디지털 정체성'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 越来越多的人开始精心经营自己的___，在虚拟空间中塑造出与现实生活有所不同的自我形象。(More and more people are starting to carefully cultivate their digital identity, shaping a self-image in virtual space that differs somewhat from their real-life self.)

explanation.en: 「揭示」means "to reveal".
explanation.ko: 「揭示」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这项关于虚拟现实的研究___了长期沉浸于虚拟世界可能对人们现实感知造成的潜在影响。(This research on virtual reality revealed the potential impact that prolonged immersion in virtual worlds might have on people's perception of reality.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其完全沉溺于虚拟世界所营造的美好幻象，___不如时常提醒自己回归真实的生活与人际交往。(Rather than completely indulging in the beautiful illusions created by the virtual world, it's better to frequently remind oneself to return to real life and interpersonal interaction.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 虚拟世界___为人们提供了前所未有的沉浸式体验，___过度依赖依然可能导致个体与现实生活的疏离。(Even though the virtual world provides people with an unprecedented immersive experience, excessive reliance on it can still lead to individuals becoming estranged from real life.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 虚拟与真实的界限之所以日益模糊，___是因为科技的发展使得拟像的逼真程度已经足以以假乱真。(The reason the boundary between virtual and real is becoming increasingly blurred is precisely because technological development has made simulacra realistic enough to be mistaken for the genuine article.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦过度沉溺于虚拟世界所构筑的完美幻象，___容易逐渐丧失对真实生活的兴趣与投入。(Once a person becomes overly immersed in the perfect illusions constructed by the virtual world, they easily gradually lose interest in and engagement with real life.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，虚拟与真实边界的日渐模糊___提醒着人类必须重新审视技术与人性之间的关系。(In the final analysis, the increasingly blurred boundary between virtual and real still reminds humanity that it must reexamine the relationship between technology and human nature.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，技术的进步与人类的判断力___共同决定着虚拟与真实之间那条日益模糊的边界。(From this we can see that both technological progress and human judgment jointly determine the increasingly blurred boundary between virtual and real.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，沉浸式虚拟技术___能够带来极为逼真的感官体验，却也伴随着认知混淆的潜在风险。(As everyone knows, immersive virtual technology often can bring extremely realistic sensory experiences, but it is also accompanied by potential risks of cognitive confusion.)

explanation.en: 「岂仅是〜」is a classical-style rhetorical construction.
explanation.ko: 「岂仅是〜」는 고전적 반어 구문이다.

questions.prompt: 虚拟世界的诱惑，岂___单纯的感官娱乐，实则触及了人类对现实本质这一根本问题的深刻叩问。(The allure of the virtual world is by no means merely simple sensory entertainment, but truly touches on a profound inquiry into the fundamental question of the nature of reality.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 过度依赖虚拟社交___会削弱人们在现实中建立深度人际关系的能力。(Excessive reliance on virtual socializing often weakens people's ability to build deep interpersonal relationships in reality.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 时常提醒〜: 不如时常提醒 (not 时常不如提醒).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '时常提醒〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如时常提醒'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其完全沉溺于虚拟世界所营造的美好幻象，时常不如提醒自己回归真实的生活与人际交往。(Rather than completely indulging in the beautiful illusions created by the virtual world, it's better to frequently remind oneself to return to real life and interpersonal interaction.) — find the error
choices: 与其完全沉溺于虚拟世界所营造的美好幻象，不如时常提醒自己回归真实的生活与人际交往。
与其完全沉溺于虚拟世界所营造的美好幻象，时常不如提醒自己回归真实的生活与人际交往。
与其完全沉溺于虚拟世界所营造的美好幻象，不如提醒时常自己回归真实的生活与人际交往。
与其完全沉溺于虚拟世界所营造的美好幻象，时常提醒不如自己回归真实的生活与人际交往。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 虚拟与真实的界限之所以日益模糊，因为是科技的发展使得拟像的逼真程度已经足以以假乱真。(The reason the boundary between virtual and real is becoming increasingly blurred is precisely because technological development has made simulacra realistic enough to be mistaken for the genuine article.) — find the error
choices: 虚拟与真实的界限之所以日益模糊，是因为科技的发展使得拟像的逼真程度已经足以以假乱真。
虚拟与真实的界限之所以日益模糊，因为是科技的发展使得拟像的逼真程度已经足以以假乱真。
虚拟与真实的界限之所以日益模糊，是科技的发展因为使得拟像的逼真程度已经足以以假乱真。
虚拟与真实的界限之所以日益模糊，科技的发展是因为使得拟像的逼真程度已经足以以假乱真。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦过度沉溺于虚拟世界所构筑的完美幻象，容易才逐渐丧失对真实生活的兴趣与投入。(Once a person becomes overly immersed in the perfect illusions constructed by the virtual world, they easily gradually lose interest in and engagement with real life.) — find the error
choices: 一个人一旦过度沉溺于虚拟世界所构筑的完美幻象，就容易逐渐丧失对真实生活的兴趣与投入。
一个人一旦过度沉溺于虚拟世界所构筑的完美幻象，容易才逐渐丧失对真实生活的兴趣与投入。
一个人一旦过度沉溺于虚拟世界所构筑的完美幻象，才容易逐渐丧失对真实生活的兴趣与投入。
一个人一旦过度沉溺于虚拟世界所构筑的完美幻象，容易逐渐才丧失对真实生活的兴趣与投入。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其完全沉溺于虚拟世界所营造的美好幻象，不如时常提醒自己回归真实的生活与人际交往 ("Rather than completely indulging in the beautiful illusions created by the virtual world, it's better to frequently remind oneself to return to real life and interpersonal interaction").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其完全沉溺于虚拟世界所营造的美好幻象，不如时常提醒自己回归真实的生活与人际交往' (가상세계가 만든 아름다운 환상에 완전히 빠져 있느니 차라리 종종 스스로에게 실제 삶과 인간관계로 돌아가라고 상기시키는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其完全沉溺于虚拟世界所营造的美好幻象，__________提醒自己回归真实的生活与人际交往。(Rather than completely indulging in the beautiful illusions created by the virtual world, it's better to frequently remind oneself to return to real life and interpersonal interaction.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一个人一旦过度沉溺于虚拟世界所构筑的完美幻象，就容易逐渐丧失对真实生活的兴趣与投入 ("Once a person becomes overly immersed in the perfect illusions constructed by the virtual world, they easily gradually lose interest in and engagement with real life").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一个人一旦过度沉溺于虚拟世界所构筑的完美幻象，就容易逐渐丧失对真实生活的兴趣与投入' (사람은 일단 가상세계가 만든 완벽한 환상에 지나치게 빠지면 점차 현실 생활에 대한 흥미와 몰입을 잃기 쉽다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦过度沉溺于虚拟世界所构筑的完美幻象，__________逐渐丧失对真实生活的兴趣与投入。(Once a person becomes overly immersed in the perfect illusions constructed by the virtual world, they easily gradually lose interest in and engagement with real life.)
